name: Apple Crumble Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Green apples; thinly sliced (peeled before slicing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Melt the butter in a medium skillet over medium heat on top of the stove.
3. Add the apples, cover and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Remove the cover and add the sugar, lemon juice, mace, and cornstarch. Cook another minute, stirring, then remove from the heat and set aside.
5. Place the prepared pie shell in the oven and bake for 10 minutes.
6. While the pie shell is baking, combine the cookie crumbs, melted butter, and brown sugar and mix well.
7. Remove the pie shell from the oven and add the cooked apple mixture.
8. Sprinkle the cookie crumble over the apples and replace in the oven for another 20 minutes.
9. Cool the pie to room temperature before serving.
